name: Rinse
notes: On-demand laundry and dry cleaning delivery service headquartered in San Francisco, CA.

name: Standishmanagement
notes: Standish Management LLC — private fund administration firm. Moved U.S. HQ to Boston (from San Francisco) per 2018 BusinessWire announcement; confirmed as Boston-based by THL and multiple 2023–2026 sources. Industry is fund administration (VC/PE support); closest vocabulary label is Venture Capital.

name: Longpond
notes: Long Pond Capital LP — hedge fund focused on real estate and related sectors, HQ at 527 Madison Ave, New York, NY. Industry label 'Venture Capital' used as closest fit for investment management firm.

name: Mirador Llc
notes: Mirador LLC — financial technology provider of consolidated reporting and data management for family offices and wealth management firms. Relocated HQ to 850 Canal Street, Stamford, CT in 2022. Acquired by iCapital in 2024.

name: Aisling Capital
notes: Aisling Capital LLC — private equity/venture capital firm focused on life sciences/healthcare, headquartered in New York City, NY.

name: Archdocuments
notes: Appears to be Arch (archdocuments.com) — a digital alternatives management platform for private investment portfolios (family offices, RIAs, banks). HQ identified as New York, NY based on corroborating sources describing the company at 225 Park Avenue South. Confidence is medium as domain branding differs from primary brand name.

name: Lw
notes: Latham & Watkins LLP — major global law firm. lw.com is their official domain. Founded and formally headquartered in Los Angeles, CA (355 S Grand Ave). Industry label 'LegalTech' used; this is a traditional law firm, not a tech company per se.

name: Afore
notes: Afore Capital — pre-seed stage venture capital firm, headquartered at 680 2nd Street, San Francisco, CA 94107. Founded 2016 by Anamitra Banerji and Gaurav Jain.

name: Nea
notes: New Enterprise Associates (NEA) — major venture capital firm, primary HQ at 2855 Sand Hill Rd, Menlo Park, CA 94025. Also has offices in Chevy Chase MD, San Francisco, New York, and DC.

name: Blocktower
notes: BlockTower Capital — institutional cryptocurrency and digital assets investment firm. Moved HQ from New York to Miami (1221 Brickell Ave) in July 2021.

name: Rtp
notes: RTP Global — global venture capital firm, US HQ at 885 3rd Ave Fl 24, New York City, NY 10022. Originally founded in Russia (formerly RTP Ventures), now operates globally with primary US presence in New York.
